heading_content_part: Privacy PolicySkip to main contentSearch This BlogBlack CatPrivacy PolicyGet linkFacebookTwitterPinterestEmailOther AppsSeptember 22, 2020Privacy PolicyBlack Cat team has adopted this privacy policy (“Privacy Policy”) to explain howBlack Catcollects, stores, and uses the information collected in connection withBlack Cat’s Services.

BY INSTALLING, USING, REGISTERING TO OR OTHERWISE ACCESSING THE SERVICES, YOU AGREE TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY AND GIVE AN EXPLICIT AND INFORMED CONSENT TO THE PROCESSING OF YOUR PERSONAL DATA IN ACCORDANCE WITH THIS PRIVACY POLICY. IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY, PLEASE DO NOT INSTALL, USE, REGISTER TO OR OTHERWISE ACCESS THE SERVICES.Black Catreserves the right to modify this Privacy Policy at reasonable times, so please review it frequently. IfBlack Cat

makes material or significant changes to this Privacy Policy,Black Catmay post a notice onBlack Cat’s website along with the updated Privacy Policy. Your continued use of Services will signify your acceptance of the changes to this Privacy Policy.

decoder_heading: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal Data
ident_heading: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal Data
heading_content_part: Disclosure and Transfer of Personal Data

Black Catcollects and processes personal data on a voluntary basis and it is not in the business of selling your personal data to third parties. Personal data may, however, occasionally be disclosed in accordance with applicable legislation and this Privacy Policy. Additionally, Black Cat may disclose personal data to its parent companies and its subsidiaries in accordance with this Privacy Policy.Black Catmay hire agents and contractors to collect and process personal data onBlack Cat

’s behalf and in such cases such agents and contractors will be instructed to comply with our Privacy Policy and to use personal data only for the purposes for which the third party has been engaged byBlack Cat. These agents and contractors may not use your personal data for their own marketing purposes.Black Catmay use third party service providers such as credit card processors, e-mail service providers, shipping agents, data analyzers and business intelligence providers.Black Cat

has the right to share your personal data as necessary for the aforementioned third parties to provide their services forBlack Cat.Black Catis not liable for the acts and omissions of these third parties, except as provided by mandatory law.Black Catmay disclose your personal data to third parties as required by law enforcement or other government officials in connection with an investigation of fraud, intellectual property infringements, or other activity that is illegal or may expose you orBlack Cat

to legal liability.Black Catmay also disclose your personal data to third parties whenBlack Cathas a reason to believe that a disclosure is necessary to address potential or actual injury or interference withBlack Cat’s rights, property, operations, users or others who may be harmed or may suffer loss or damage, orBlack Catbelieves that such disclosure is necessary to protectBlack Cat’s rights, combat fraud and/or comply with a judicial proceeding, court order, or legal process served onBlack Cat
. To the extent permitted by applicable law,Black Catwill make reasonable efforts to notify you of such disclosure throughBlack Cat’s website or in another reasonable manner.
Safeguards

Black Catfollows generally accepted industry standards and maintains reasonable safeguards to attempt to ensure the security, integrity and privacy of the information inBlack Cat’s possession. Only those persons with a need to process your personal data in connection with the fulfillment of their tasks in accordance with the purposes of this Privacy Policy and for the purposes of performing technical maintenance, have access to your personal data inBlack Cat’s possession. Personal data collected byBlack Cat

is stored in secure operating environments that are not available to the public. To prevent unauthorized on-line access to personal data,Black Catmaintains personal data behind a firewall-protected server. However, no system can be 100% secure and there is the possibility that despiteBlack Cat’s reasonable efforts, there could be unauthorized access to your personal data. By using the Services, you assume this risk.

Any data that you disclose in any of these forums, blogs, chats or the like is public information, and there is no expectation of privacy or confidentiality.Black Catis not responsible for any personal data you choose to make public in any of these forums.
